TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == hinangelungelu'ay a imelangśÖĘśÄßÁĖ≤ŚčěÁóáŚÄôÁĺ§ hinangelungelu'ay a imelang "kamu nu Ing, chronic fatigue syndrome, CFS misaadidi tu sulit, CFS" singangan aca tu adada ku heci adada ku tangah atu hinangelungelu'ay a imelang "myalgic encephalomyelitis, misaapuyu' tu sulit ME" ayza papulung han ku ngangan adada ku heci adada ku tangah atu hinangelungelu'ay a imelang "ME/CFS", u manaunay a imelang nu uzip alalid sa mangelu' acaay panukas ku imelang, piazih tu imelang lalid katukuh tu 6 a bulad, cayay ku katinengan a ngelu' u lalekalan caay katineng mangelu' utiih ku uzip. (ME/CFS), . nilaculan imahini mahiniay a imelang u cayay henay katinengan, caay ka yadah ku katinengan tu katalawan, iayaw nau ledek a imelang sa, nika katahkalan nu ke-ci caay kataneng ku picukel tu mahiniay a kamu. hamin u adada'ay mabiyalaw atu ngelu' nu pikawaw. atu katenes caay katatungus ku nikauzip, anu matenes ngelu' sa ku balucu' uzip,caay pisakapah tu uzip, hakay u kakatalawantu, makay adidi' ku "ngelu'" malapihacengay a "kangelu'". i 2015 a mihcaan, migingkiway tu imelangay a gingkiw ing "masuma tu ku ngangan Amilika kanatal miginngkiway tu imelang" patahkal tu baluhay a nipaketinan tu mahiniay a imelang a tataneng ku piazih tu imelang, muluyaw pangangan "u hina ngelu'ay a imelang" "systemic exertion intolerance disease, SEID", nika caay patatenga' ku katuuday. Śú®2015ŚĻī, . hinabi'ay hinalibulubut, caay ku hinalibulibutay, hinabi'ay a imelang 2 sin, kuyni pihacengay magelu'ay a imelang atu sakalawlaw a halikabi'ay a imelang migingkiw tu halibi'ay caay kahapinang, uyza miida tu zumaay a pikinsa, hakay uyni pinaay kasahini a imelang, kasazuma nu imelang tabaki ku nikatatungduh anucaay hamin u matatungduhay. tucek tu pinaay a kasahini katukuh ayza migingkiw tu imelang caay henay katinengan ku halibi'ay a imelang, cacay ku nu imelangay tu kamu sakay kacekil mikuwan tu sakaput "bu-ta talakaway a cacudadan a sakaput maawas ku pikinngsa tu aadupan tahakal ku mahiniay kacekilmikuwan tu masakaput, mahiniay tabaki adidi'ay 3-5 MM sya-s-ciw-cin-huw-cyun, u pingaay tu sya-s-ciw-cin-huw-cyun uzuma pihaceng ku kahalibi'" tapiingay a husu izang mapuut "kaadidi'an tu 1 MM masumad ku imelang hawsa uyza 3T ce-kung-cen tatenga' caay kaazih, 3T ce-kung-cen tatenga u kasa padekuan satalakaway icelangay a ce-kung-cen a nilacul, u nikacakat, u hamin nu kitakit satalakaway a gizice u sapiazih a ce-kung-cen anilacul mi-saw-myaw tuyni a adada, 1MM a pisaheci mukuwan hakay apina ku patalakaw, mahizatu cay katineng" a malakii' ku walakli, malakii' ku walakli mala u lahaday tu 7*24 a tatukian ku kabulesen, namahini kalabi'tu, mahicahicaay a imelang.
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == ńßinaŇč…ôr~…ĺuŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ °aj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč******* ńßinaŇč…ôr~…ĺuŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ °aj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč "kamu nu iŇč, ¶ńßroni ¶ fatigu…ô sjndrom…ô, ¶fs misaadidi tu sur~…ĺit, ¶fs" siŇčaŇčan a ¶a tu adada ku ńß…ô ¶i adada ku taŇčańß atu ńßinaŇč…ôr~…ĺuŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ °aj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč "mjar~…ĺgi ¶ …ôn ¶…ôpńßar~…ĺomj…ôr~…ĺitis, misaapuju Ē~ ° tu sur~…ĺit m…ô" ajza papur~…ĺuŇč ńßan ku ŇčaŇčan adada ku ńß…ô ¶i adada ku taŇčańß atu ńßinaŇč…ôr~…ĺuŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ °aj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč "m…ô/ ¶fs", u manaunaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč nu uzip ar~…ĺar~…ĺid sa maŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° a ¶aaj panukas ku im…ôr~…ĺaŇč, piazińß tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč r~…ĺar~…ĺid katukuńß tu * a bur~…ĺad, ¶ajaj ku katin…ôŇčan a Ňč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° u r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan ¶aaj katin…ôŇč maŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° utiińß ku uzip. (m…ô/ ¶fs), . nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan imańßini mańßiniaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč u ¶ajaj ńß…ônaj katin…ôŇčan, ¶aaj ka jadańß ku katin…ôŇčan tu katar~…ĺawan, iajaw nau r~…ĺ…ôd…ôk a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč sa, nika katańßkar~…ĺan nu k…ô- ¶i ¶aaj katan…ôŇč ku pi ¶uk…ôr~…ĺ tu mańßiniaj a kamu. ńßamin u adada Ē~ °aj mabijar~…ĺaw atu Ňč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° nu pikawaw. atu kat…ôn…ôs ¶aaj katatuŇčus ku nikauzip, anu mat…ôn…ôs Ňč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° sa ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° uzip, ¶aaj pisakapańß tu uzip, ńßakaj u kakatar~…ĺawantu, makaj adidi Ē~ ° ku "Ňč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ °" mar~…ĺapińßa ¶…ôŇčaj a "kaŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ °". i **** a mińß ¶aan, migiŇčkiwaj tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj a giŇčkiw iŇč "masuma tu ku ŇčaŇčan amir~…ĺika kanatar~…ĺ miginŇčkiwaj tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč" patańßkar~…ĺ tu bar~…ĺuńßaj a nipak…ôtinan tu mańßiniaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč a tatan…ôŇč ku piazińß tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč, mur~…ĺujaw paŇčaŇčan "u ńßina Ňč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ °aj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč" "sjst…ômi ¶ …ô*…ôrtion intor~…ĺ…ôran ¶…ô dis…ôas…ô, s…ôid", nika ¶aaj patat…ôŇča Ē~ ° ku katuudaj. ******, . ńßinabi Ē~ °aj ńßinar~…ĺibur~…ĺubut, ¶aaj ku ńßinar~…ĺibur~…ĺibutaj, ńßinabi Ē~ °aj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč * sin, kujni pińßa ¶…ôŇčaj mag…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ °aj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč atu sakar~…ĺawr~…ĺaw a ńßar~…ĺikabi Ē~ °aj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč migiŇčkiw tu ńßar~…ĺibi Ē~ °aj ¶aaj kańßapinaŇč, ujza miida tu zumaaj a pikinsa, ńßakaj ujni pinaaj kasańßini a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč, kasazuma nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč tabaki ku nikatatuŇčduńß anu ¶aaj ńßamin u matatuŇčduńßaj. tu ¶…ôk tu pinaaj a kasańßini katukuńß ajza migiŇčkiw tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč ¶aaj ńß…ônaj katin…ôŇčan ku ńßar~…ĺibi Ē~ °aj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč, ¶a ¶aj ku nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj tu kamu sakaj ka ¶…ôkir~…ĺ mikuwan tu sakaput "bu-ta tar~…ĺakawaj a ¶a ¶udadan a sakaput maawas ku pikinŇčsa tu aadupan tańßakar~…ĺ ku mańßiniaj ka ¶…ôkir~…ĺmikuwan tu masakaput, mańßiniaj tabaki adidi Ē~ °aj *-* mm sja-s- ¶iw- ¶in-ńßuw- ¶jun, u piŇčaaj tu sja-s- ¶iw- ¶in-ńßuw- ¶jun uzuma pińßa ¶…ôŇč ku kańßar~…ĺibi Ē~ °" tapiiŇčaj a ńßusu izaŇč mapuut "kaadidi Ē~ °an tu * mm masumad ku im…ôr~…ĺaŇč ńßawsa ujza *t ¶…ô-kuŇč- ¶…ôn tat…ôŇča Ē~ ° ¶aaj kaazińß, *t ¶…ô-kuŇč- ¶…ôn tat…ôŇča u kasa pad…ôkuan satar~…ĺakawaj i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj a ¶…ô-kuŇč- ¶…ôn a nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ, u nika ¶akat, u ńßamin nu kitakit satar~…ĺakawaj a gizi ¶…ô u sapiazińß a ¶…ô-kuŇč- ¶…ôn anir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ mi-saw-mjaw tujni a adada, *mm a pisańß…ô ¶i mukuwan ńßakaj apina ku patar~…ĺakaw, mańßizatu ¶aj katin…ôŇč" a mar~…ĺakii Ē~ ° ku war~…ĺakr~…ĺi, mar~…ĺakii Ē~ ° ku war~…ĺakr~…ĺi mar~…ĺa u r~…ĺańßadaj tu **** a tatukian ku kabur~…ĺ…ôs…ôn, namańßini kar~…ĺabi Ē~ °tu, mańßi ¶ańßi ¶aaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč.
S.FORM: == kakiliman == hinangelungelu'ay a imelangśÖĘśÄßÁĖ≤ŚčěÁóáŚÄôÁĺ§ hinangelungelu'ay a imelang "kamu nu Ing, chronic fatigue syndrome, CFS misaadidi tu sulit, CFS" singangan aca tu adada ku heci adada ku tangah atu hinangelungelu'ay a imelang "myalgic encephalomyelitis, misaapuyu' tu sulit ME" ayza papulung han ku ngangan adada ku heci adada ku tangah atu hinangelungelu'ay a imelang "ME/CFS", u manaunay a imelang nu uzip alalid sa mangelu' acaay panukas ku imelang, piazih tu imelang lalid katukuh tu 6 a bulad, cayay ku katinengan a ngelu' u lalekalan caay katineng mangelu' utiih ku uzip. (ME/CFS), . nilaculan imahini mahiniay a imelang u cayay henay katinengan, caay ka yadah ku katinengan tu katalawan, iayaw nau ledek a imelang sa, nika katahkalan nu ke-ci caay kataneng ku picukel tu mahiniay a kamu. hamin u adada'ay mabiyalaw atu ngelu' nu pikawaw. atu katenes caay katatungus ku nikauzip, anu matenes ngelu' sa ku balucu' uzip,caay pisakapah tu uzip, hakay u kakatalawantu, makay adidi' ku "ngelu'" malapihacengay a "kangelu'". i 2015 a mihcaan, migingkiway tu imelangay a gingkiw ing "masuma tu ku ngangan Amilika kanatal miginngkiway tu imelang" patahkal tu baluhay a nipaketinan tu mahiniay a imelang a tataneng ku piazih tu imelang, muluyaw pangangan "u hina ngelu'ay a imelang" "systemic exertion intolerance disease, SEID", nika caay patatenga' ku katuuday. Śú®2015ŚĻī, . hinabi'ay hinalibulubut, caay ku hinalibulibutay, hinabi'ay a imelang 2 sin, kuyni pihacengay magelu'ay a imelang atu sakalawlaw a halikabi'ay a imelang migingkiw tu halibi'ay caay kahapinang, uyza miida tu zumaay a pikinsa, hakay uyni pinaay kasahini a imelang, kasazuma nu imelang tabaki ku nikatatungduh anucaay hamin u matatungduhay. tucek tu pinaay a kasahini katukuh ayza migingkiw tu imelang caay henay katinengan ku halibi'ay a imelang, cacay ku nu imelangay tu kamu sakay kacekil mikuwan tu sakaput "bu-ta talakaway a cacudadan a sakaput maawas ku pikinngsa tu aadupan tahakal ku mahiniay kacekilmikuwan tu masakaput, mahiniay tabaki adidi'ay 3-5 MM sya-s-ciw-cin-huw-cyun, u pingaay tu sya-s-ciw-cin-huw-cyun uzuma pihaceng ku kahalibi'" tapiingay a husu izang mapuut "kaadidi'an tu 1 MM masumad ku imelang hawsa uyza 3T ce-kung-cen tatenga' caay kaazih, 3T ce-kung-cen tatenga u kasa padekuan satalakaway icelangay a ce-kung-cen a nilacul, u nikacakat, u hamin nu kitakit satalakaway a gizice u sapiazih a ce-kung-cen anilacul mi-saw-myaw tuyni a adada, 1MM a pisaheci mukuwan hakay apina ku patalakaw, mahizatu cay katineng" a malakii' ku walakli, malakii' ku walakli mala u lahaday tu 7*24 a tatukian ku kabulesen, namahini kalabi'tu, mahicahicaay a imelang.
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == ńßinaŇč…ôr~…ĺuŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ °aj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč******* ńßinaŇč…ôr~…ĺuŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ °aj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč "kamu nu iŇč, ¶ńßroni ¶ fatigu…ô sjndrom…ô, ¶fs misaadidi tu sur~…ĺit, ¶fs" siŇčaŇčan a ¶a tu adada ku ńß…ô ¶i adada ku taŇčańß atu ńßinaŇč…ôr~…ĺuŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ °aj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč "mjar~…ĺgi ¶ …ôn ¶…ôpńßar~…ĺomj…ôr~…ĺitis, misaapuju Ē~ ° tu sur~…ĺit m…ô" ajza papur~…ĺuŇč ńßan ku ŇčaŇčan adada ku ńß…ô ¶i adada ku taŇčańß atu ńßinaŇč…ôr~…ĺuŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ °aj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč "m…ô/ ¶fs", u manaunaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč nu uzip ar~…ĺar~…ĺid sa maŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° a ¶aaj panukas ku im…ôr~…ĺaŇč, piazińß tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč r~…ĺar~…ĺid katukuńß tu * a bur~…ĺad, ¶ajaj ku katin…ôŇčan a Ňč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° u r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan ¶aaj katin…ôŇč maŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° utiińß ku uzip. (m…ô/ ¶fs), . nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan imańßini mańßiniaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč u ¶ajaj ńß…ônaj katin…ôŇčan, ¶aaj ka jadańß ku katin…ôŇčan tu katar~…ĺawan, iajaw nau r~…ĺ…ôd…ôk a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč sa, nika katańßkar~…ĺan nu k…ô- ¶i ¶aaj katan…ôŇč ku pi ¶uk…ôr~…ĺ tu mańßiniaj a kamu. ńßamin u adada Ē~ °aj mabijar~…ĺaw atu Ňč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° nu pikawaw. atu kat…ôn…ôs ¶aaj katatuŇčus ku nikauzip, anu mat…ôn…ôs Ňč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° sa ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° uzip, ¶aaj pisakapańß tu uzip, ńßakaj u kakatar~…ĺawantu, makaj adidi Ē~ ° ku "Ňč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ °" mar~…ĺapińßa ¶…ôŇčaj a "kaŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ °". i **** a mińß ¶aan, migiŇčkiwaj tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj a giŇčkiw iŇč "masuma tu ku ŇčaŇčan amir~…ĺika kanatar~…ĺ miginŇčkiwaj tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč" patańßkar~…ĺ tu bar~…ĺuńßaj a nipak…ôtinan tu mańßiniaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč a tatan…ôŇč ku piazińß tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč, mur~…ĺujaw paŇčaŇčan "u ńßina Ňč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ °aj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč" "sjst…ômi ¶ …ô*…ôrtion intor~…ĺ…ôran ¶…ô dis…ôas…ô, s…ôid", nika ¶aaj patat…ôŇča Ē~ ° ku katuudaj. ******, . ńßinabi Ē~ °aj ńßinar~…ĺibur~…ĺubut, ¶aaj ku ńßinar~…ĺibur~…ĺibutaj, ńßinabi Ē~ °aj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč * sin, kujni pińßa ¶…ôŇčaj mag…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ °aj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč atu sakar~…ĺawr~…ĺaw a ńßar~…ĺikabi Ē~ °aj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč migiŇčkiw tu ńßar~…ĺibi Ē~ °aj ¶aaj kańßapinaŇč, ujza miida tu zumaaj a pikinsa, ńßakaj ujni pinaaj kasańßini a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč, kasazuma nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč tabaki ku nikatatuŇčduńß anu ¶aaj ńßamin u matatuŇčduńßaj. tu ¶…ôk tu pinaaj a kasańßini katukuńß ajza migiŇčkiw tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč ¶aaj ńß…ônaj katin…ôŇčan ku ńßar~…ĺibi Ē~ °aj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč, ¶a ¶aj ku nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj tu kamu sakaj ka ¶…ôkir~…ĺ mikuwan tu sakaput "bu-ta tar~…ĺakawaj a ¶a ¶udadan a sakaput maawas ku pikinŇčsa tu aadupan tańßakar~…ĺ ku mańßiniaj ka ¶…ôkir~…ĺmikuwan tu masakaput, mańßiniaj tabaki adidi Ē~ °aj *-* mm sja-s- ¶iw- ¶in-ńßuw- ¶jun, u piŇčaaj tu sja-s- ¶iw- ¶in-ńßuw- ¶jun uzuma pińßa ¶…ôŇč ku kańßar~…ĺibi Ē~ °" tapiiŇčaj a ńßusu izaŇč mapuut "kaadidi Ē~ °an tu * mm masumad ku im…ôr~…ĺaŇč ńßawsa ujza *t ¶…ô-kuŇč- ¶…ôn tat…ôŇča Ē~ ° ¶aaj kaazińß, *t ¶…ô-kuŇč- ¶…ôn tat…ôŇča u kasa pad…ôkuan satar~…ĺakawaj i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj a ¶…ô-kuŇč- ¶…ôn a nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ, u nika ¶akat, u ńßamin nu kitakit satar~…ĺakawaj a gizi ¶…ô u sapiazińß a ¶…ô-kuŇč- ¶…ôn anir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ mi-saw-mjaw tujni a adada, *mm a pisańß…ô ¶i mukuwan ńßakaj apina ku patar~…ĺakaw, mańßizatu ¶aj katin…ôŇč" a mar~…ĺakii Ē~ ° ku war~…ĺakr~…ĺi, mar~…ĺakii Ē~ ° ku war~…ĺakr~…ĺi mar~…ĺa u r~…ĺańßadaj tu **** a tatukian ku kabur~…ĺ…ôs…ôn, namańßini kar~…ĺabi Ē~ °tu, mańßi ¶ańßi ¶aaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč.
